scripts.build: pnpm --filter @case-study/shared build && pnpm --filter @case-study/functions build && pnpm --filter @case-study/web build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @case-study/functions build && concurrently "firebase emulators:start --only firestore,functions" "pnpm --filter @case-study/functions dev" "pnpm --filter @case-study/web dev"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @case-study/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @case-study/functions typecheck && pnpm --filter @case-study/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @case-study/shared test && pnpm --filter @case-study/functions build && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,functions "pnpm --filter @case-study/functions test"
